description: gvSIG is open with the 'countries_base' project loaded. Create a new point Shapefile layer and save it to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/survey_sites.shp. Define the attribute fields as site_name (String, length 50), site_type (String, length 30), and priority (Integer, length 5). Digitize three survey sites anywhere on the map with the following attribute data: Alpha Station (Weather, priority 1), Beta Outpost (Seismic, priority 2), and Gamma Point (Tidal, priority 3). Ensure the layer is saved and visible in the View.
